response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum bar with roughly 18 years of software engineering experience and a technical bachelor's degree, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience as founder of an open-source geo-data platform and recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic tooling). However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the resume shows a strong senior/staff full-stack builder rather than an engineering leader with a public AI track record, cloud platform strategy experience, or advisory work with strategic customers.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder/entrepreneurial experience running an open-source platform used in production by NGOs
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work with builder-level code fluency
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at the depth the role requires
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy or engineering leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of advising customers or influencing at the executive level

key_factors.factor: Long tenure, founder experience, and emerging AI-agent work
